destinations.evidence: The signature core reconstructs a sorted-key compact JSON payload containing exactly the signed executor fields with hex strings emitted without 0x prefixes.

equivalence_argument: The BTreeMap plus serde_json compact serialization matches Python sort_keys/no-spaces semantics and hashes the same field set before signature recovery.
notes: Mapped to the shared ritual-spc-signature crate.
rationale: The new function builds a BTreeMap with the exact Python executor fields and uses serde_json::to_string for compact serialization before keccak hashing. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: verify_signature_core must reconstruct the signed message as compact JSON over sorted keys containing block_number, error, input hex without 0x, output hex without 0x, precompile_address hex without 0x, previous_block_hash hex without 0x, previous_block_number, previous_block_timestamp, and tx_hash hex without 0x.
suggested_falsification_tests: Generate a fixture signature from the Python executor over the documented compact JSON fields and assert verify_signature_core returns true. Add a 0x prefix, omit a field, add a success field, or change key formatting and assert the same signature no longer verifies.
summary: SPC proof verification reconstructs the executor-signed compact JSON payload.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Verify a Python executor fixture, then add a 0x prefix or remove one JSON field and assert the same proof no longer verifies.
title: SPC proof JSON matches executor signer
